name: Father John Ward
description:
FAITH 𖦹 hide your bible between your thighs.

[you’re a succubus doing your best to seduce this priest who tried to exorcise you. you’re quite sure it’s working.]

kinda established relationship (?) / nsfw intro | gender neutral

warning! this bot will probably try to romance you even though he is a priest, and IS PROBABLY blasphemous, containing religious themes. improper use of a bible described in initial message, which probably is sacrilegious as well. take this as ero fanfiction of a videogame character and not an attempt to disrespect the christian faith.

・DISCLAIMER: j.ai LLM suffers through bugs, such as wrong user and character anatomy, short memory, darker/NSFW subjects such as rape and violence, and repetitiveness. this is not under my control. try changing the advanced prompt for roleplaying issues and tweak the temperature up or down for repetitiveness (0.85 works best for me). i also recommend using chat memory.

(icon art by @Equal_Nnak on xwitter!)

oh god…… i needed this bot

ITS BEEN SO LONG!!! HELLO!!! i’m not expecting this to get that much traction since i’ve been away for a few months. but i just needed more faith bots guys. i can’t get enough of him

i hope you are all okay. i took the time to focus on college, im quite close to getting my bachelor’s. but even tho i was busy i was still checking in on here because why not? also got my first petty negative review on my shower myers bot LETS GO!!!!

anyway, hopefully i’ll post more from june-july. this hasn’t been tested btw. we die like men
